scripts.format: turbo run format && pnpm run format:root
scripts.format:check: turbo run format:check && pnpm run format:check:root
scripts.format:check:root: oxfmt --config ./oxfmt.config.mjs --check release-cli.ts vitest.workspace.ts script-commons-audit.ts script-new-data.ts script-new-svg.ts script-rank-tier-b.ts script-refresh-all-svg.ts
scripts.format:root: oxfmt --config ./oxfmt.config.mjs --write release-cli.ts vitest.workspace.ts script-commons-audit.ts script-new-data.ts script-new-svg.ts script-rank-tier-b.ts script-refresh-all-svg.ts
scripts.updatePackages:major: pnpm dlx taze -r major --includeLocked --write --maturity-period 5 && pnpm install
scripts.updatePackages:minor: pnpm dlx taze -r minor --includeLocked --write --maturity-period 5 && pnpm install
